overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a truck driving along the Los Santos Freeway. The journey transitions from rocky mountain cuttings through a dense pine forest corridor to open highway with light traffic, captured during warm golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain highway cutting through rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: driving a truck through a rocky mountain pass with steep cliffs and guardrails on the right side

entered.detail: steep rocky mountainside with exposed stone and boulders
silver metal highway guardrail running along the right side of the road
scattered small trees and shrubs on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The truck drives through a rocky mountain cutting with steep cliffs on the right protected by metal guardrails. Sparse vegetation dots the left hillside while the road curves gently through the terrain. No other vehicles are present on this secluded stretch.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested highway corridor with tall pines

events.description: on-screen text 'Los Santos Freeway' appears in the bottom right corner

agents.ego_description: cruising through a dense pine forest corridor with trees lining both sides of the highway

entered.detail: tall dense pine trees forming a green corridor on the left side

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a dense forest corridor with tall pines creating a tunnel-like effect over the highway. The rocky terrain gives way to lush green vegetation on both sides. The location text 'Los Santos Freeway' appears briefly on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with traffic and rocky hills

events.description: first sight of other vehicles ahead on the highway
location text appears indicating 'Los Santos Wind Farm' area

agents.ego_description: driving on open highway following traffic and maneuvering around other vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same lane at moderate speed

entered.detail: multiple cars and trucks visible ahead on the highway
rocky terrain and hills returning on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Exiting the forest, the highway opens up to reveal other traffic ahead. The truck continues along the Los Santos Freeway with rocky hills returning on the right and guardrails lining the road. Several vehicles are visible ahead, and the location text indicates the Wind Farm area as the truck maintains highway speed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a highway that transforms from a secluded mountain pass into a bustling freeway corridor. It begins by driving through a rocky mountain cutting with steep cliffs and metal guardrails, curving gently through a desolate landscape with sparse vegetation. As the terrain shifts, the open road enters a dense forest corridor where tall pines create a tunnel-like effect and lush greenery replaces the stone. The scene then opens up as the truck exits the woods, revealing a wider stretch of the Los Santos Freeway with other vehicles appearing ahead. Finally, the landscape returns to rocky hills near the Wind Farm area as the truck maintains its speed amidst light highway traffic.
